title: HS2 information event 12th October 2015: Relocation of Salusbury Road shaft to Canterbury Works
body: "This is a joint event between HS2 and Brent Borough Council about a change in the proposals for the HS2 railway, which would be in a tunnel under Kilburn.  We are proposing to move the site of one of the tunnel’s ventilation shafts from Salusbury Road to a site at Canterbury Works.  Date:  Monday 12 October  Time:  3pm to 8pm  Location:   South Kilburn Studios,2A Canterbury Rd,London, NW6 5SW   View this location on a map  For further information on this event, please contact the HS2 helpdesk:   Public enquiries     Email hs2enquiries@hs2.org.uk     HS2 Ltd helpdesk 020 7944 4908      "
